title: Minecadia Lifesteal api
description: Allows you to see /f rally and active koths on minecadia lifetsteal
body:
What is this mod?

Well this mod is for the people who plays on minecadia lifesteal its a mod that allows users to set a wavepoint on there teams map while being on the mod on top of that it sets a wavepoint to your map on where a active koth/dtc is taking place (can only be viewed if on the same team but active events can be viewed by anyone)


 Why would a user want to download it?

 Well its a simple quality of life for the users who play minecadia lifesteal and helps the users see where there teamates are.
